text: Hey. How are you doing? It's Nancy calling from Wellness Direct. Thanks for picking up. Actually, there's a painless glucose monitor that tracks your sugar all day. No fingerprints. To see if you qualify for this, do you have Medicare Part A and B? I don't lay them down. Find your prick here. [BLANK_AUDIO]
